# `recurring` - database schema slice

## `RecurringTransaction`

```prisma
model RecurringTransaction {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId          String
  title           String
  amount          Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  category        String
  subcategory     String?
  interval        String    @default("monthly") // weekly, monthly, yearly
  nextDueDate     DateTime
  autoProcess     Boolean   @default(false)
  status          String    @default("active") // active, paused, cancelled
  accountId       String?
  description     String?
  merchant        String?
  lastProcessedAt DateTime?
  clientRequestId String?   @unique
  syncStatus      String    @default("synced")
  // â”€â”€â”€ Extended fields (schema alignment with Dexie client) â”€â”€â”€
  type               String?   // income | expense | transfer
  startDate          DateTime?
  endDate            DateTime?
  reminderDaysBefore Int?
  notes              String?
  transferToAccountId String?
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt       DateTime?
  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([nextDueDate])
  @@index([syncStatus])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@map("recurring_transactions")
  @@schema("public")
}
```
